DISCOVERY 301, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TODD STEVENS, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS OF HIS CURRENT AND FORMER EMPLOYEES, AND FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES PAYABLE BY DEFENDANT SALESFORCE.COM, INCORPORATED IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN A COMPELLING BASIS TO OVERCOME PLAINTIFF'S PRIVACY RIGHTS AND, IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANT'S SUBPOENAS ARE IMPERMISSIBLY OVERBROAD. SANCTIONS AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00. THE COURT ALSO NOTED THAT THERE WAS A PAYMENT OF FEES TO THE COMPLEX LITIGATION DEPARTMENT BUT THERE WAS NO PENDING APPLICATION. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Quash Subpoenas Of His Current And Former Employees, And For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees Payable By Defendant Salesforce.Com, Inc.; Declaration Of Todd Stevens, Charles H. Jung, Compendium Of Federal Authorities
Off Calendar Mar-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHARLES H. JUNG OF THE NASSIRI & JUNG LLP, TEL. NO. 762-3100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF AND MOVING PARTY;
ATTY. E. JEFFREY GRUBE OF PAUL HASTINGS & WALKER, LLP, TEL. NO. 856-7020 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TODD STEVENS, INDIVIDUALLY AND ON BEHALF OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas Of His Current And Former Employees, And For An Award Of Attorneys' Fees Payable By Defendant Salesforce.Com, Incorporated is Granted. Defendant has not shown a compelling basis to overcome Plaintiff's privacy rights and, in any event, Defendant's subpoenas are impermissibly overbroad. Sanctions awarded to Plaintiff in the amount of $500.00. THE COURT ALSO NOTED THAT THERE WAS A PAYMENT OF FEES TO THE COMPLEX LITIGATION DEPARTMENT BUT THERE WAS NO PENDING APPLICATION. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
